fields.description: A unique name for this agent.
fields.label: Agent Name

fields.description: The AI provider that will power this agent (e.g., OpenAI, OpenRouter).
fields.label: Provider

fields.description: The specific AI model to use from the selected provider (e.g., gpt-4-turbo).
fields.label: Model

fields.description: The system prompt or instructions that define the agent's personality, goals, and constraints. This is the core logic of the agent.
fields.label: Instructions

fields.description: What sampling temperature to use, between 0 and 2. Higher values like 0.8 will make the output more random, while lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic.
fields.label: Temperature

fields.description: The set of tools this agent is allowed to use to interact with the system.
fields.label: Agent Tool

fields.description:
An alternative to sampling with temperature, called nucleus sampling, where the model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass. So 0.1 means only the tokens comprising the top 10% probability mass are considered.

We generally recommend altering this or temperature but not both.
fields.label: Top P

fields.description: If checked, this agent will run automatically based on the defined schedule.
fields.label: Is Scheduled Agent

fields.description: The frequency at which the scheduled agent will run.
fields.label: Scheduled Interval

fields.description: The number of intervals to wait before running the agent again (e.g., if interval is 'Hourly' and count is 2, it will run every 2 hours).
fields.label: Interval count

fields.description: The timestamp of the last time this scheduled agent was executed.
fields.label: Last Execution

fields.description: The timestamp of the next scheduled execution.
fields.label: Next Execution

fields.description: If checked, this agent will be disabled and will not run.
fields.label: Disabled

fields.description: Define system prompt, goal, and constraints
fields.label: Instruction

fields.description: The DocType to monitor for the selected event.
fields.label: Reference DocType

fields.description: The specific DocType event that will trigger this agent (e.g., on_submit, before_save).
fields.label: Doc Event
fields.options:
before_insert
after_insert
validate
before_save
after_save
before_submit
on_submit
after_submit
on_cancel
before_rename
after_rename
on_trash
after_delete

fields.description: If checked, this agent will be triggered by a DocType event.
fields.label: Is Doc Event Agent

fields.description: A Python expression that must evaluate to true for the agent to be triggered by the DocType event. You can use `doc` to refer to the document.
fields.label: Condition

fields.description: If checked, this agent can be interacted with in the Agent Chat window.
fields.label: Allow Chat

fields.description: If checked, the conversation history with this agent will be saved and loaded for future sessions.
fields.label: Persist Conversation

fields.description: Configure language model settings
fields.label: LLM Configuration

fields.description: Configure conversation behaviour
fields.label: Conversation Settings

fields.description: A short summary describing what this agent does or is designed for.
fields.label: Description
